markets.question: ZED FC vs. Modern SC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Egypt Egyptian Premier League game between ZED FC and Modern SC, scheduled for March 11 at 3:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both ZED FC and Modern SC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on efa.com.eg. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: ZED FC vs. Modern SC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Egypt Egyptian Premier League game, scheduled for March 11 at 3:30 PM ET.
